elements.text:
あら、今日は
たくさん
褒めて
くれるね
どうかし
たの？

こんなに
可愛い
からこそ…

先に絶対着ると
約束してくれ

目が
怖い
わ…
田舎の少女の
世界へ!
は
小

キュレネ(少女)は
やっぱ可愛いな〜

もっと
可愛い服を
着るべきだと
え

不可能
じゃない
でしょう
？

悪用!
してる!
悪用しようと

ち…
ちなみに…
あっ

どんな服を
着て
欲しいの
？
未知の世界へ
小
Oh my, you're showering me with compliments today... what's up?
It's precisely because you're so cute...
Promise me you'll wear it first, no matter what.
Y-your eyes are scary... Into the world of a country maiden! ...Ha.
What kind of outfit would you like me to wear?
Michi no Sekai e (Into the Unknown World)
Cyrene (the girl) really is cute, isn't she~
She really ought to wear even cuter clothes.
E (Huh?)
It's not impossible... is it?
You're misusing it! Trying to misuse it!
B-by the way...
A (Ah!)
Promise me you'll definitely wear it first.
Your eyes... are scary...
Michi no sekai e (To the Unknown World)
小
It's precisely because you're this cute...
Abusing it! I'm abusing it! Trying to abuse it!
Oh my, you're praising me a lot today. What's gotten into you?
What kind of clothes do you want me to wear?
Kyurene (the girl) really is cute~
...you should be dressed in even cuter clothes!
E (Huh?)
It's not impossible, right?
J-just out of curiosity...
A (Ah!)
MICHINOSEKAI E (To an Unknown World)
It's exactly because you're so cute…
They're exploiting it! …Trying to exploit it!
小
